title: Request fw to have malaysia 919 in preset

messages.author: limesoft
messages.text: Would like to request fw that we load to have an option to select malaysia 919 (MY919) preset
messages.content_html: Would like to request fw that we load to have an option to select malaysia 919 (MY919) preset

messages.author: ndoo
messages.text: hello, can we get some reply here? https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/980 i'm part of a team running a bunch of mountaintop repeaters in malaysia. until we have a proper preset, we can't roll out further.
messages.content_html: hello, can we get some reply here? https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/980 i'm part of a team running a bunch of mountaintop repeaters in malaysia. until we have a proper preset, we can't roll out further.
embeds_html:
Add Malaysia LoRa presets · Issue #980 · meshcore-dev/MeshCore
Malaysia has 2 valid regions: 1. 33cm band (ISM, for general use i.e. unlicensed users) - I suggest to just name this "Malaysia". 919 - 923 Mhz at 500mW, no restrictions. 923 - 924 MHz at...

messages.author: ndoo
messages.text: @Cisien since there is already a small group of users using Victoria, could we go with that initially, at least to see SNR
messages.content_html: @Cisien since there is already a small group of users using Victoria, could we go with that initially, at least to see SNR

messages.author: ndoo
messages.text: that's one part of the evaluation needed, for the other, how about link budget? like, other than surveying other band users, if we have a general idea of the distance we would like to achieve, does that help to inform the preset too?
messages.content_html: that's one part of the evaluation needed, for the other, how about link budget? like, other than surveying other band users, if we have a general idea of the distance we would like to achieve, does that help to inform the preset too?
messages.reply_html:
Cisien
What we found in the US is that there are power meters spread across the entire ism band, so it would be good to check to make sure you dont have to deal with anything similar. Getting on a hill with a view of the urban area would be helpful
